name: LMR Layered Oxide Raman
description: Raman peak assignments for LMR layered oxide samples. Includes PPTX Eg/A1g modes and conservative layered/spinel reference markers.

assignments.name: LMR Eg mode (O-TM-O bending)
assignments.note: PPTX range: 476-503 cm-1. Slide 11 defines Eg as O-TM-O bending vibration.

assignments.name: Li2MnO3 M-phase marker
assignments.note: Reference marker outside PPTX. Monoclinic Li2MnO3 / M-phase Raman region.

assignments.name: Li2MnO3 M-phase / layered oxide marker
assignments.note: Reference marker outside PPTX. M-phase/layered oxide contribution near the Eg region.

assignments.name: LMR A1g mode (TM-O symmetric stretching)
assignments.note: PPTX range: 600-609 cm-1. Slide 11 defines A1g as TM-O symmetric stretching.

assignments.name: LiMO2 A1g position marker
assignments.note: PPTX slide 10 sample A1g positions: 589.5-591.6 cm-1.

assignments.name: Spinel-like LiMn2O4 A1g marker
assignments.note: Reference marker outside PPTX. Spinel-like Mn-O stretching region used as a degradation/phase marker.
